facts.claim: For a cruise that’s sure to go down in the history books, turn to Carnival Legend. This cruise ship is pack with fun, both indoors and out, earning its legendary nameplate. See photos, staterooms, deck plans, onboard activities, and itinerary options. Book your Carnival Legend cruise today!
Legends are made, not born... and over time, this ship has become even more deserving of its nameplate. Let’s discover some of the secrets of Carnival Legend.
Carnival Legend is a Spirit-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
Her maiden voyage, Carnival's first cruise in Europe, was a three-night journey from Harwich to Amsterdam and return.
